title: EventStudySpec v1
description: Domain-neutral event-alignment specification: declares event family, anchor policies, timing constraints, window structures, leakage controls, and event-quality rules for experiments. Does not include options-specific, pre-earnings-specific, or computed-assessement fields.

event_study_spec_id.description: Canonical event study specification identifier. Format: EVS-YYYY-NNNN.

event_study_version.description: Monotonically increasing version. Start at 1. Increment on any field change after initial commit.

event_source_refs.description: References to DataManifest entries that provide event timestamps and event metadata.

event_anchor_policy.description: How the event anchor timestamp is determined.

event_timestamp_policy.description: Acceptable timestamp precision for event times.

decision_timestamp_policy.description: When the decision timestamp falls relative to event publication.

pre_event_window.description: Pre-event observation window definition. Sign of offsets is not enforced here; use the validator for start/end order checks and sign requirements.

start_offset.description: Offset from the event anchor to the window start (negative for pre-event windows, zero or positive for post-event windows).

end_offset.description: Offset from the event anchor to the window end.

include_event_anchor.description: Whether the event anchor itself is included in the window. Default: false for pre-event, false for post-event.

post_event_window.description: Post-event observation window definition. start_offset may be zero (anchor included) or positive. Sign and order checks are delegated to the validator.

start_offset.description: Offset from the event anchor to the window start. Zero or positive for post-event windows.

end_offset.description: Offset from the event anchor to the window end.

include_event_anchor.description: Whether the event anchor itself is included in the window.

leakage_policy.description: Controls to prevent lookahead bias around event timing.

event_deduplication_policy.description: How duplicate events in the same window are resolved.

event_collision_policy.description: How overlapping events from different sources are resolved.

missing_event_time_policy.description: How events with missing or ambiguous timestamps are handled.

calendar_policy.description: How window offsets map to calendar or trading time.

event_type_filter.description: Restrict events to specific subtypes within event_family.

event_importance_filter.description: Minimum importance or significance threshold for events to include.

event_source_priority.description: Priority order for event sources when multiple sources report the same event.

event_quality_filter.description: Filters on event data quality metrics.

allow_revisions.description: Whether revised event times are allowed.

max_revisions.description: Maximum number of revisions allowed before exclusion.

require_announcement_time.description: Whether the exact announcement time must be known.

trading_calendar_ref.description: Reference to a trading calendar artifact for session-bound event studies.

market_session_policy.description: Which market session(s) an event applies to.

event_lag_policy.description: How to handle events discovered after the fact (late announcements, revisions).

max_event_lag_days.description: Maximum lag in days before an event is considered stale.

announcement_status_policy.description: How to handle preliminary, revised, or confirmed event announcements.

domain_profile_refs.description: References to domain profiles providing domain-specific event-alignment enrichments.

outcome_spec_refs.description: References to OutcomeSpecs that measure outcomes within this event study's windows.

instrument_universe_refs.description: References to InstrumentUniverseSpecs applicable to events in this study.

runner_output_refs.description: References to runner outputs produced under this event study.

review_packet_refs.description: References to ReviewPackets that evaluated hypotheses using this event study.

extension_hooks.description: Reserved for future artifact references only. Must not contain computed statistics.

domain_profile_extension_refs.description: Extended references to domain profile specifications.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about event study design rationale.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of event study declaration.

reviewer.description: Human reviewer metadata for this event study declaration. Must be an object with at minimum a name field.
